name: Car Crossey Bridge Game
description: Car Crossy Bridge ek exciting aur addictive casual driving game hai jisme aapko apni car ko dangerous bridges par safely cross karna hota hai. Har bridge ek new challenge lekar aata hai jahan aapko perfect timing, sharp driving skills aur fast decision making ki zaroorat hoti hai. Is thrilling bridge crossing game me aapko narrow roads, moving platforms aur tricky obstacles ka samna karna hoga. Jitna zyada aap survive karenge utna high score achieve karenge. Agar aapko crossy road games, bridge driving challenges, aur casual car racing adventures pasand hain to Car Crossy Bridge aapke liye best game hai.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
